category_sources: source_facts.description; official Keeper Commander README describes a CLI and SDK interface to Keeper Password Manager and KeeperPAM.
display_name_sources: official GitHub README uses the product name Keeper Commander; source_facts.name is keeper-commander.
docs_sources: official Keeper GitHub README links to Keeper Commander documentation on docs.keeper.io; source_facts.homepage is the same official docs path.
repo_sources: official Keeper Commander GitHub README includes running from source with git clone https://github.com/Keeper-Security/Commander.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official README describes CLI, terminal UI, Python SDK, vault administration, password rotation, and KeeperPAM integration.
